'''Baskarn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The planet was inhabited by the large, green-furred, [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Yrashu]]. The planet was also home to the dangerous [[Razor tree]]s. Baskarn was the site of the [[Battle of Baskarn]] in which the indigenous Yrashu instinctively fought the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as they could sense its ties to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. In the events leading up to the battle, a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] were adopted into a Yrashu tribe and went through a [[momu]], in which they were taught [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] survival according to the Yrashu way. The tribe participated in the battle, and emerged victorious along with the Rebels.

{{Planet-stub}}
